blockers.description: UI-SPEC.md missing — UI safety gate blocked plan-phase. Phase 2 has UI content (auth forms, standalone template shell, responsive mobile). Need UI design contract before planning.
blockers.workaround: Run /gsd-ui-phase 2 to generate UI-SPEC.md, or use /gsd-plan-phase 2 --skip-ui to bypass (not recommended)

decisions.decision: Phase 2 research spawned gsd-phase-researcher — produced comprehensive RESEARCH.md covering 7 packages, integration points, pitfall mitigations, and validation architecture
Validation strategy created from RESEARCH.md — 19 automated test cases mapped to AUTH-01 through AUTH-05 requirements, per-task verification map, Wave 0 gaps identified
Plan-phase exited at UI Design Contract Gate — Phase 2 ROADMAP has 'UI hint: yes' and no UI-SPEC.md exists

next_action: Run /gsd-ui-phase 2 to generate the UI design contract, then re-run /gsd-plan-phase 2 to continue planning
context_notes: Phase 2 planning was proceeding normally: research completed (7 packages verified, all integration points documented), validation strategy created (19 test cases). Hit the UI safety gate at step 5.6 — Phase 2 has frontend indicators (auth templates, forms, responsive mobile). The CONTEXT.md has 33 locked decisions covering auth layout, password reset flow, role assignment, session behavior, redirects, password policy, user model, email handling, rate limiting, and DB migrations. All decisions are researched — planner has everything needed once UI-SPEC is generated.
